lines.speaker: Operator
lines.text: How can I help you, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any ore for me?

lines.speaker: Operator
lines.text: Here you go. That's all the ore I have for you.

lines.speaker: Operator
lines.text: None of the ore here is yours, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I mine in this place?

lines.speaker: Operator
lines.text: Okay, first you need dynamite. That's got three ingredients...

lines.speaker: Operator
lines.text: Once you've got dynamite, use a chisel to excavate a cavity in the hard rock walls, so you can put the dynamite in, then light the fuse.

lines.speaker: Operator
lines.text: The dynamite blows ore out of the hard rock. It's very unstable, so you don't have long to get it cleaned before it disintegrates.

lines.speaker: Operator
lines.text: Just deposit it into the sack upstream, and my colleague will get it cleaned safely. You can collect your cleaned ore from me.

lines.speaker: Operator
lines.text: I work here, in the blast mine. It's a valuable source of minerals for the kingdom, so our work is very important.

lines.speaker: Operator
lines.text: The ore from the blast mines is unstable, and needs washing quickly before it disintegrates, so the Lovakengj engineers invented this machine to clean it.

lines.speaker: Operator
lines.text: The design's a secret; even if someone tried to copy it, they'd never get it quite right. I bet their machine would break down all the time.
